---
title: "Typst Margin Geometry Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['inner:', 'outer:', 'sep:.*in', 'width:.*in']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

::: {.column-margin}
Margin content with letter paper size.
:::

Text in main column. The page geometry should be automatically calculated
based on the paper size (letter = 8.5in width).
